definition:
βουλεύω 
 (βουλή), [in LXX chiefly for יעץ ;] 
to take counsel, deliberate, resolve. In mid., 
  1. to take counsel with oneself, consider: before εἰ, Luk.14:31. 
   2. to determine with oneself, resolve: with inf., Act.5:33 27:39; with accusative, 2Co.1:17; before ἵνα, Jhn.11:53 12:10 (cf. παρα-, συμ-).
† (AS)
